message:
fix: resolve 26 test failures across 5 card test files (#5338)

- CardChat: use shouldAdvanceTime with fake timers to prevent userEvent
  timeouts (14 tests)
- ArgoCDApplicationSets: use getAllByText for status labels that appear
  in both stats grid and list rows (1 test)
- ClusterHealth: fix vi.mock paths for clusters/utils and
  ClusterDetailModal (off-by-one directory from __tests__), use regex
  for inline node/pod counts, handle duplicate text after modal open
  (7 tests)
- NamespaceOverview: use getAllByText for cluster/namespace values that
  appear in both selectors and rendered content (2 tests)
- NodeConditions: click confirmation dialog button (index 0) instead of
  row button (index last) for cordon/uncordon actions (2 tests)

Closes #5334

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
